title: Environment parity foundation — environment-map.schema.json + dev reference instance (supersedes d-2026-06-10-eb-env-parity-foundation)
description: Establishes the canonical environment-map.schema.json governing per-environment infrastructure posture (tags, LB/firewall membership, SSH posture, held-key requirement, TLS origin-cert provenance, per-env TF variable contract) and lands the three-environment reference instance with dev as the compliant reference (proven by d-2026-06-13-eb-dev-droplet-rebuild) and staging/production recorded at honest current posture with outstanding convergence flagged. Supersedes the dormant d-2026-06-10-eb-env-parity-foundation, whose original scope predates the 2026-06-11/12/13 hardening arcs that delivered the actual convention. Schema authored PR alpha (schema-only); this deliverable anchors + lands the reference instance PR beta.

outputs.description: environment-map.schema.json v1.0.0 landed as canonical schema (PR alpha, schema-only, separate PR). Registered in schema-refs.json as #49, catalog v1.28.0 -> v1.29.0. Governs per-environment posture composing with infrastructure-catalog /definitions/environment.
acceptanceCriteria: environment-map.schema.json present at schemas/ and valid Draft-7 (ajv compile PASS)

outputs.description: Three-environment reference instance environment-map.json landed: dev complianceStatus=compliant (reference, proven by d-2026-06-13-eb-dev-droplet-rebuild); staging=convergence-target (unheld luhtech-admin-1 flagged); production=exception-declared (standing-restricted SSH blue-green + firewall ID->tag convergence pending). Validates against environment-map.schema.json v1.0.0.
acceptanceCriteria: environment-map.json validates against environment-map.schema.json v1.0.0 (ajv PASS)
dev entry complianceStatus=compliant with held sshKeys + tag-based LB/firewall + zero-ssh + BW-backed cert
staging + production entries recorded at honest current posture, NOT painted compliant
PENDING-RA-ITEMID-* and PENDING-*-IP placeholders documented in notes as convergence-deliverable reconciliation items

environment-map.json ajv-valid against environment-map.schema.json v1.0.0 (4-flag canonical)

EB-chat authors production convergence child (firewall ID->tag + standing-restricted declaration + admin-1) validating against schema, done last/deliberately, never under demo pressure

transitions.trigger: L4 named-step authorized env-parity supersede + arc (Erik, 2026-06-13). Deliverable id d-2026-06-13-sr-env-parity-foundation approved; SR-chat authors reference instance. Supersedes dormant d-2026-06-10-eb-env-parity-foundation.

notes: Supersedes d-2026-06-10-eb-env-parity-foundation (dormant since 2026-06-10; original scope predated the 2026-06-11/12/13 hardening that delivered the actual env-parity convention). The dormant deliverable was never anchored at SR (no instance ever existed); this supersede is a forward-replacement, not a closure of an existing instance. Convention substrate: EB-chat env-parity dump 2026-06-13, verified @ EB main 7072fe12 (3-env reads) + 257c2b1b (dev rebuild proven). Two-PR structure: PR alpha (environment-map.schema.json + schema-refs, schema-only, landed separately); PR beta (this deliverable anchor + environment-map.json reference instance). Convergence ledger: dev=compliant reference; staging=remove unheld luhtech-admin-1; production=firewall ID->tag migration + declare standing-restricted + address unheld admin-1, done last and deliberately. EB-chat authors the staging + prod convergence children as separate deliverables validating against environment-map.schema.json. Enterprise Excellence. Schema-First. No Shortcuts.
